name: io.github.mario-andreschak/mcp-whatsapp-web
title: WhatsApp Web MCP Server
description: MCP server for WhatsApp via whatsapp-web.js: send/receive messages, media, chats, groups, contacts

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log level for the log file (logs/mcp-whatsapp.log)

environmentVariables.name: LOG_STDERR_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log level for stderr (visible in most MCP client logs)

environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_HEADLESS
environmentVariables.description: Set to false to show the browser window instead of running headless (debugging aid)

environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_EXECUTABLE_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Browser executable. Chrome and Edge are auto-detected in their standard install locations; set this only to use a specific browser. A real Chrome/Edge is required for sending videos and GIFs.

environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_SESSION_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Where the WhatsApp session (browser profile) is stored (default: <working directory>/whatsapp-sessions)

environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_PAIRING_PHONE_NUMBER
environmentVariables.description: Phone number pairing: when set (international, symbol-free format, e.g. 4915112345678), an 8-character pairing code is logged to stderr on startup instead of relying on the QR code

environmentVariables.name: FFMPEG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to an ffmpeg binary (only needed to override the ffmpeg installed automatically via the ffmpeg-static npm package)

environmentVariables.name: WA_WEB_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: Pin the WhatsApp Web version. Only set this if a WhatsApp-side update breaks the client.

environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_CHECK_INTERVAL_MS
environmentVariables.description: Connection health check interval in milliseconds (<=0 disables)

environmentVariables.name: TOOL_READY_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: How long tool calls wait for the WhatsApp client to become ready before erroring

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: When set, additionally exposes the MCP endpoint at http://127.0.0.1:<port>/mcp (Streamable HTTP) from the same process

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Bind address for the HTTP endpoint (do not expose publicly; the endpoint controls your personal WhatsApp account)

environmentVariables.name: MCP_OAUTH
environmentVariables.description: Enable OAuth for the HTTP endpoint: /mcp requires a bearer token and clients authenticate via a browser page showing the WhatsApp QR code / pairing form
